title: Battery Operated Flameless LED Tea Lights Candles 24-Pack Realistic Flickering Electric Fake Candle with Warm White Bulb Light for Christmas, Halloween, Festivals, Weddings Decoration
features: 【1】 Realistic Tea Light Value Bag PACKAGE INCLUDE – 24 LED Flameless tea lights (Size: Φ 1.5in/3.8cm x H 1.5in/3.8cm). Batteries are included and installed. On/Off sliding switch makes it easy to use.
【2】LONG BATTERY LIFE. Each LED tea lights use a CR2032 button cell which is very efficient and easy to buy online or from local store. Last about 100 hours with a new battery，batteries Included.

【3】CREATE AMBIENCE. The warm white flameless LED tea lights candles flicker and provide the effect of an actual candle ,Flameless Candles to Create a Warm Ambiance, perfect for decorating weddings, parties, gardens, patios, decks, restaurants, lanterns, kids projects, centerpieces ,Valentine's day decoration，Halloween Decoration,Diwali Decoration,Easter decoration, Various holiday decorationsetc.Prayer candle,Mother's day gift,Easter party.

【4】 SAFE & NO FIRE RISK,NO HASSLE & NO FLAMESS – The battery tea lights candles can be used inHalloween Decorations, Halloween Party, Tabletop, Mantle, and more bedrooms, lounges, dens, bathrooms, etc. Absolutely no flameless; no dripping wax, no smoke, no matches.

【5】WHY CHOOSE US: There are so many ways why you should choose us. All of our products are manufactured under strict quality controls. If you have any problems, please contact us immediately. We PROMISE offering you a satisfactory solution.
description: Product Description No Flames, No Smoke, No Melted Wax. Without having burning risks. Advantages of led tea lights Without fire, smoke, safe to use around children and pets - Led candles without real fire. The battery tea lights candles are designed to flicker in a realistic way so that one can feel the atmosphere of an actual candle flame without any hazard or hassles. Very easy to use, these electronic fake candles can be turned on and off by the flick of a switch. Mini tealights, very small in size. The flameless candles tea lights are easily portable. Perfect for lighting up a romantic scene and ideal for decorations. Specification: Size: d1.5x h1.5 inches Light color: Warm White Power:Battery Powered Battery: CR2032 button cell. Battery life: 100+hours Material: LED+PP Style: Art Deco Appearance color: White Excellent decor items for wedding receptions, dinner parties, holiday gatherings and other events, which is versatile for various occasion. Realistic and flickering battery operated tea lights candles, feel and style of a beautiful wax candle, but without all the mess or heavy scents. Replace your traditional candles with the most elegant flameless flickering candles & enjoy their relaxing effect with peace of mind! These electronic tea lights can be given away as gifts or party favors. CR2032 lithium batteries are included in this product. Last approx 100+hours of non-stop use.
